title: BEM-920 protocol record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM920_SYSTEM_EVOLUTION_PROTOCOL.md with content # BEM-920 SYSTEM EVOLUTION PROTOCOL
Status: SYSTEM_EVOLUTION_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS
Date: 2026-05-30
Purpose: new system development protocol after Claude APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS for BEM-919 and operator request to separately list object/element prompts for approval.
Correction applied:
- This protocol is full-system, not Telegram-only.
- Telegram is one module inside the overall system evolution roadmap.
- Claude's 13 requirements are mandatory acceptance criteria.
Key mandatory requirements included:
1. Create governance/state/elements_registry.json for all elements.
2. Create element prompts for WRK-C1, WRK-C2, WRK-C3 and curator/contour elements.
3. objects_registry.json must reference elements_registry.json.
4. release_proof_manifest.json commit_sha must be non-null from CI/Git.
5. Dispatch consumer must have an auto-trigger on queue item added.
6. Create telegram_input_envelope_schema.json and Telegram-to-managed-channel mapping.
7. Define managed channel consumer.
8. BEM-925 PASS equals deterministic runner + state files + role reports; LLM runtime is later operator-gated stage.
9. Telegram E2E separates mock_status and production_status.
10. Add concurrency groups to core workflows.
11. report_period_config.json must have version and owner OPERATOR.
12. BEM-923 gate lists secret names without values.
13. BEM-928 bundle checklist is fixed before assembly.
Roadmap:
- BEM-920 Elements SSOT, prompts, component inventory and concurrency baseline.
- BEM-921 Proof hardening and release SHA.
- BEM-922 Telegram input schema and General Director routing.
- BEM-923 Operator production gate.
- BEM-924 Dispatch lifecycle and auto-trigger.
- BEM-925 Object execution lifecycle.
- BEM-926 Managed channel, event log and canonical reports.
- BEM-927 Telegram E2E selftest with mock/production split.
- BEM-928 Claude re-audit package.
Prompt approval scope:
- Existing prompts: curator_prompt.md if present, general_director_prompt.md, director_prompt.md, worker_prompt.md.
- New required prompts: gd_curator_prompt.md, dir_curator_prompt.md, wrk_curator_prompt.md, wrk_c1_registry_architecture_prompt.md, wrk_c2_rules_communication_prompt.md, wrk_c3_execution_testing_product_prompt.md, dir_rules_contour_prompt.md, dir_planning_analytics_prompt.md, gd_internal_contour_prompt.md.
